import pandas as pd

cpi = data['CPIAUCSL'].copy()
cpi['date'] = pd.to_datetime(cpi['date'])
cpi = cpi.sort_values('date')
cpi['yoy_inflation'] = cpi['value'].pct_change(12) * 100
latest = cpi.dropna().iloc[-1]
start = cpi.iloc[-61]
level_change = ((latest['value'] / start['value']) - 1) * 100

result = {
    'metrics': [
        {
            'name': 'latest_yoy_inflation',
            'value': round(float(latest['yoy_inflation']), 2),
            'unit': 'percent',
            'source_series': ['CPIAUCSL'],
        },
        {
            'name': 'cpi_level_change_5y',
            'value': round(float(level_change), 2),
            'unit': 'percent',
            'source_series': ['CPIAUCSL'],
        },
    ]
}
